title: Apple Pie Day: America's Sweetest Slice
story: Every May 13, kitchens across America fill with the smell of cinnamon and baked apples as people celebrate National Apple Pie Day! Families gather to bake homemade pies using their favorite apple varieties like Granny Smith or Honeycrisp. Bakeries offer special deals on fresh pies, while restaurants serve up warm slices topped with vanilla ice cream. Social media buzzes with photos of golden-brown crusts and perfectly spiced fillings. Some people host pie-baking contests with friends, while others simply enjoy a slice with coffee or milk. It's the perfect day to honor America's most beloved dessert!
activity_question: What do people commonly put on top of apple pie slices on this holiday?
bonus_fact: The phrase "as American as apple pie" became popular in the 1920s!

title: Hop to It: National Frog Jumping Day
story: Every May 13, people across America celebrate National Frog Jumping Day by hosting hilarious hopping contests! This wacky holiday started because of Mark Twain's famous story about a jumping frog named Dan'l Webster. Today, towns hold official frog jumping competitions where real frogs leap for prizes. Contestants gently encourage their amphibian athletes to jump as far as possible, measuring each hop carefully. Some events raise money for wildlife conservation, while others are just for laughs. Kids love cheering for their favorite frogs with silly names like "Sir Hops-a-Lot" or "Bouncy Betty." Winners get ribbons, and all frogs get returned safely to their ponds afterward!
activity_question: What do people measure during frog jumping contests?
activity_choices: How high the frogs can jump
How far each frog can leap
How fast the frogs can swim
How loudly the frogs can croak
activity_answer: How far each frog can leap
bonus_fact: The world record frog jump was over 21 feet in three hops!

title: Dip Into National Hummus Day!
story: Every May 13, people across America celebrate National Hummus Day by diving into bowls of this creamy, delicious dip! Hummus is made from chickpeas, tahini, olive oil, and garlic, creating a healthy snack that's perfect with pita chips, carrots, or cucumbers. Restaurants offer special hummus deals, grocery stores set up tasting stations, and families try making their own flavors at home. Some people get creative with toppings like pine nuts, paprika, or even chocolate chips for dessert hummus!
activity_question: What is the main ingredient in hummus?
bonus_fact: Hummus has been eaten in the Middle East for over 700 years!

title: Flying High on Top Gun Day
story: Fighter jets roar across movie screens everywhere on May 13 as fans celebrate National Top Gun Day! This awesome holiday honors the legendary 1986 movie about Navy pilots who fly super-fast jets and compete to be the best. People mark this special day by watching Top Gun movies, sharing their favorite quotes like "I feel the need for speed," and posting cool airplane photos on social media. Some fans even visit aviation museums or air shows to see real fighter jets up close. Aviation enthusiasts love showing off their knowledge of different aircraft, while others just enjoy the thrilling action scenes and memorable characters that made Top Gun a classic.
activity_question: What famous quote do Top Gun fans often share on this holiday?
activity_choices: I feel the need for speed
May the force be with you
activity_answer: I feel the need for speed
bonus_fact: The movie's jets can fly faster than the speed of sound!
